content.text: i present you this project, what does it have to offer ours worth integrating: https://github.com/example/project

Going through this against your stated direction. Here are the patterns worth borrowing:

## Worth integrating

1. Filesystem-queue + drainer pattern
2. Sentinel protocol for idle signals
3. Sidecar proposal pattern
4. Per-iteration manifest with terminated_by field
5. Rate-limit handling modes

## Skip / already covered

- Chain runner — already have main-pipeline.js
- Telegram bot — out of scope
- systemd templates — operator concern

## Net recommendation

Five patterns worth borrowing, three to skip. The queue dir + sentinel + sidecar are highest-leverage; everything else is either out-of-scope or already covered.
